title: research_5.0
text:
[VISUAL CONTENT - Page 2]
1.  **Mathematical Equations:**

    *   `Reliability = (1 - (hours_unavailable_caused_by_unscheduled_outages / total_hours)) * 100%`

        This equation calculates the reliability of a power plant as a percentage. It subtracts the ratio of unavailable hours due to unscheduled outages to the total hours from 1 and multiplies the result by 100.  A higher reliability indicates fewer unscheduled maintenance outages.
